creator: mystify@friley-184-92.res.iastate.edu
text:
The cdplayer applet in the current GNOME port does not work.  Part of
the problem is that cdplayer.c tries to open /dev/cdrom instead of
/dev/rcd0c as other CD player ports do.  When this is changed, the
following kernel messages are repeated until the applet is removed from
the panel:

	scsi_cd: cdioctl: cdioreadsubchannel: error, len=0

Beyond this, I do not know how to debug the problem.

How-To-Repeat: Modify line 268 of applets/cdplayer/cdplayer.c to load /dev/rcd0c and
try to play an audio CD.
